PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?player ?playerLabel WHERE {
  ?player p:P54 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P54 wd:Q8969 .
  ?statement pq:P39 wd:Q5733 .
  ?statement pq:P580 ?startDate .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?statement pq:P582 ?endDate
  }
  .
  FILTER(STR(?startDate) <= "2023-12-31")
  FILTER((! BOUND(?endDate)) ||(STR(?endDate) >= "2023-01-01"))
  OPTIONAL {
    ?player rdfs:label ?playerLabel
    FILTER(lang(?playerLabel) = "en")
  }
}
ORDER BY DESC(?startDate)
LIMIT 1
